data.title: Implement merge conflict detection in per-worktree-review-commit.md
data.description:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md to handle merge conflicts:

1. After git merge attempt: check exit code
2. If merge fails (exit != 0):
   a. Run git merge --abort to clean up
   b. Create ticket comment: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <story-id> "CONFLICT: worktree <worktree-name> blocked"
   c. Add worktree to conflict queue (do NOT remove worktree)
   d. Continue with next worktree (non-conflicting ones proceed)
3. After all non-conflicting worktrees merged:
   a. For each conflicting worktree: queue for re-implementation against post-merge session state
   b. Re-implementation is serialized (one at a time, each against latest session state)

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md (EDIT)

### TDD Requirement
RED tests from T1 must turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-worktree-merge-conflict.sh
- [ ] Prompt contains conflict detection
  Verify: grep -qi 'CONFLICT.*worktree\|merge.*abort\|conflict.*queue' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md
- [ ] Non-conflicting worktrees continue
  Verify: grep -qi 'continue.*next\|non.conflicting' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md
